items.headline: 4-unit condo building permitted in Venture City
items.summary: A 4-unit residential building at 31 Isabela Trail receives a permit in the Venture City development.

items.headline: City Council to study Health and Safety Element updates in General Plan
items.summary: Cupertino City Council held a study session to review updates to the Health and Safety Element of the General Plan, covering the 2015-2040 community vision period. This element guides city policy on public health, emergency preparedness, hazard mitigation, and safety-related land use decisions.

items.headline: Venture Dock, Falcon X receive permits at 555 University
items.summary: Two companies have received zoning clearance for non-illuminated wall signs at the University Avenue address, along with a new use permit for a business name change. The permits suggest at least one tenant transition or rebranding at the downtown location.

items.headline: Comm Hill Phase 3.1 permits four homes across Altino Boulevard
items.summary: Four single-family homes permitted across consecutive lots (829, 835, 841, 847 Altino Bl) as part of Comm Hill's Phase 3.1. The cluster expansion continues buildout of this residential neighborhood.
